text.title: Solo Burnout Tripwires Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying solo-burnout-tripwires. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Weekly review is a paragraph of feeling ("tired but pushing through") with no numbers; founder collapses two months later.
antipattern.root-cause: No tracker; no thresholds; review becomes subjective and self-rationalising.
antipattern.fix: Force numeric inputs for all six tripwires; missing data → record N/A explicitly and treat as red until tracker exists.

antipattern.symptom: "I'll rest after the launch / fundraise / Q-end"; the deferral repeats every quarter.
antipattern.root-cause: Tripwires waived during "crisis" weeks, and crisis becomes permanent.
antipattern.fix: Allow at most ONE consecutive week of crisis waiver; second week the tripwires fire regardless; structural action required (cut scope / hire / pause).

antipattern.symptom: Founder tracks sleep only; verdict "green" while social contact is zero for 6 weeks; collapse hits anyway.
antipattern.root-cause: Cherry-picking the tripwire that looks healthy.
antipattern.fix: All six must be measured each week. Missing measurement counts as red for that tripwire.
